callRationale: Started with a freshness-scoped official-domain search for post-August-2025 TypeScript/JavaScript release notes with API changes.
Fetched the official Next.js 16 release note because it directly matched the task with a 2025-10-21 release date and several API/configuration changes.
Ran a targeted official Next.js documentation search for upgrade-guide details around cacheComponents, proxy.ts, revalidateTag, updateTag, and refresh.
Fetched the official Version 16 upgrade guide to support concrete migration examples and TypeScript/JavaScript code snippets.
strengths: Retrieved official release-note evidence and official upgrade-guide evidence.
Confirmed freshness with a release published after August 2025.
Collected more than three concrete API/configuration changes with examples.
weaknesses: The first broad search returned some unrelated TypeScript handbook pages before the targeted Next.js follow-up.
The selected artifact is a framework release rather than a small library release, though it is still a JavaScript/TypeScript package release.
